identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a high-performance, athletic, and precise badminton analysis tool that feels like a pro-level command center.

scale.label: text-xs md:text-sm font-bold tracking-widest uppercase text-muted-foreground

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-none skew-x-[-10deg] px-8 py-6 font-bold uppercase tracking-widest transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:border-primary hover:text-primary rounded-none px-8 py-6 font-bold uppercase tracking-widest transition-all

cards.default: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/10 rounded-sm p-6 relative overflow-hidden group

inputs.default: bg-black/50 border-white/10 focus:border-primary rounded-none h-12 text-white placeholder:text-white/20

badges.default: bg-white/5 text-white border border-white/10 rounded-none px-3 py-1 text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-wider

landing_page.description: Asymmetric grid with large hero visuals and smaller detail blocks. Use 'Teko' for massive headlines.

sections.name: Hero
sections.style: Full screen height, video background or dark image with neon overlay. Headline: 'MASTER YOUR GAME'. CTA: 'ANALYZE NOW'.

sections.name: Features
sections.style: Bento grid. Mix of 3D abstract elements and UI screenshots. High contrast borders.

analysis_dashboard.description: Dense information display. Video player is the hero. Metrics surround it.
analysis_dashboard.structure: Grid with 12 columns. Video: col-span-8. Metrics: col-span-4. Timeline: col-span-12 (bottom).

assets.icons: Use 'lucide-react' with stroke-width={1.5} for a technical look.

instructions_to_main_agent: UPDATE TAILWIND: Configure the font families in tailwind.config.js: sans: ['Manrope'], heading: ['Teko'].
THEME ENFORCEMENT: Force dark mode by adding 'dark' class to the html/body tag or setting default theme to dark.
NO ROUNDED CORNERS: Use 'rounded-sm' or 'rounded-none' for a sharp, aggressive sports look. Avoid 'rounded-xl' or 'rounded-full' except for specific UI elements like status dots.
DATA VISUALIZATION: Use 'recharts' with custom tooltips (dark bg, neon border). No default white tooltips.
VIDEO PLAYER: Create a custom wrapper for the video player. It needs to look like a HUD (Heads Up Display) with overlay capabilities.

LANGUAGE: Ensure all static text is in Thai as per requirements, or provide a toggle. (Problem statement says 'Target: Thai users'). Use Google Translate for placeholder text if needed, or stick to English for code and let the user know.
universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI Slop': No generic gradients, no centered text blocks without purpose.
Micro-interactions: Buttons should skew or slide on hover.
Spacing: Use 'p-8' or 'p-12' for section padding. Don't cram content.
Contrast: Ensure text is readable on dark backgrounds. Use 'text-gray-400' for secondary text, not 'text-gray-600'.
